failure_reason: Cited block p007_c0008 states 'The offset bus lane will be in operations 24 hours, seven days a week...' but does not explicitly mention 34th Street, the 34th Street busway corridor, or the 34th Street SBS project. The connection to corridor_34th-st-busway and project_34th-st-sbs-2012 relies on document-level co-occurrence (the document is about 34th Street SBS), not on block text stating the relationship. Co-occurrence in a document is not a relation.

The block text does not name 34th Street, corridor, or project — the connection is inferred from document context alone.
